returns.fundingPayment: Amount to pay/receive (positive = receive, negative = pay)

params.sizeChange: Change in position size (positive for open, negative for close)

applyFunding(uint256,uint256,bool,uint25.notice: Apply funding payment to a position

calculateFundingPayment(uint256,uint256,.notice: Calculate funding payment for a position

getFundingRate(uint256).notice: Get current funding rate for market

getMarkPrice(uint256,uint256).notice: Get mark price (index price adjusted for funding)
